creator: ports@markdixon.name
text:
I'm not likely to get to this for some time, feel free to submit a patch or take maintainership. 

Last time I looked at this, there were issues with the google code / GitHub move and they'd gone to an sbt build which was even more of a pita to do offline than Maven. 

My wip branch was here https://github.com/mnd999/freebsd-ports/tree/snappy-java-1.1.2.4?files=1
